     The Numbers Business Report

Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,000,612Details
International Box Office $24,908,479
Worldwide Box Office $41,909,091
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,127,769
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,715,348
Total $3,843,117
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Once the booming home of ​pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, Raccoon City is now a dying Midwestern town. The company’s exodus left the city a wasteland…with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, the townspeople are forever…changed…and a small group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,319,280 (31.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.20 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,803 opening theaters/2,803 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,989,765

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 24th, 2021 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 24th, 2021 (Wide), released as Resident Evil: Bienvenue à Raccoon City (France)
November 25th, 2021 (Wide) (Germany)
November 25th, 2021 (Wide) (Italy)
November 25th, 2021 (Wide) (Saudi Arabia)
November 25th, 2021 (Wide), released as Обитель зла: Раккун-Сити (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: December 21st, 2021 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence and gore, and language throughout.
(Rating bulletin 2697 (cert #53261), 9/8/2021)
Running Time: 107 minutes
Franchise: Resident Evil
Cast, crew, or production detail: Reboot
Plot point: Zombies
Subgenre: Survival Horror
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Constantin Film, Screen Gems
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Once the booming home of ​pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, Raccoon City is now a dying Midwestern town. The company’s exodus left the city a wasteland…with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, the townspeople are forever…changed…and a small group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.
